---
title: "UCR Links"
sidebar: links
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

<style>
.link-section {
  margin-top: 2rem;
}

.link-section h2 {
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
}

.link-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.8rem;
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
}

.link-card {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.85rem;
  background: #fff;
  height: 100%;
}

.link-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.link-card p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
  color: #555;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.link-card a {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.link-card a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .link-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>

## Centers and Institutes {#centers-institutes .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [Center for Plant Cell Biology (CEPCEB)](http://www.cepceb.ucr.edu/)
Research center focused on plant cell biology.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Institute for Integrative Genome Biology](http://www.genomics.ucr.edu/)
Interdisciplinary institute for genomics and systems biology research.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Department of Botany and Plant Sciences](http://plantbiology.ucr.edu/)
Departmental website for research, faculty, and academic programs.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Department of Cell Biology and Neurosciences](http://cbns.ucr.edu/)
Departmental site for cell biology and neuroscience research and teaching.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Biological Sciences Graduate Student Affairs Center (BSGSAC)](http://www.bioscigrad.ucr.edu/)
Graduate student administration and academic support resources.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Computer Science and Engineering Department](http://www.cs.ucr.edu/)
Departmental site for computing research, faculty, and programs.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Engineering Departments](http://www.engr.ucr.edu/academics/faculty.shtml)
Overview of engineering departments and faculty at UCR.
:::

:::

## Bioinformatics Sites {#bioinformatics-sites .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [Bioinformatics Labs](http://labs.bioinformatics.ucr.edu/)
Directory of bioinformatics-related labs and research groups.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Bioinformatics Facility Site](http://facility.bioinformatics.ucr.edu/)
Information on the bioinformatics facility and related resources.
:::

:::

## Graduate Programs {#graduate-programs .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [List of Available Graduate Programs at UCR](https://graduate.ucr.edu/programs)
Central directory of graduate degree programs at UCR.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Botany and Plant Sciences](http://www.plantbiology.ucr.edu/grad.html)
Graduate program information for Botany and Plant Sciences.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Graduate Program in Genetics, Genomics and Bioinformatics (GGB)](http://ggb.ucr.edu/)
Interdisciplinary graduate program in genetics, genomics, and bioinformatics.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Graduate Program in Cell, Molecular and Developmental Biology (CMDB)](http://www.cell.ucr.edu/)
Graduate program in cell, molecular, and developmental biology.
:::

:::

## Undergraduate Programs {#undergraduate-programs .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [Undergraduate Research at UCR](http://www.ora.ucr.edu/vc/UndergradResearch/Default.asp)
Campus information and opportunities for undergraduate research.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Research Experiences for Undergraduates (REU Program)](http://www.cepceb.ucr.edu/about/REUAd2005.htm)
Undergraduate summer research and training opportunities.
:::

:::

## UCR General {#ucr-general .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [Home](http://www.ucr.edu/)
Main University of California, Riverside website.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [UCR at Your Service](https://atyourserviceonline.ucop.edu/ayso)
Employee self-service portal and administrative resources.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [UCPath](http://ucpath.universityofcalifornia.edu/)
Systemwide payroll, benefits, and HR platform.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Benefits](http://atyourservice.ucop.edu/)
UC benefits information and support resources.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [PI Web Reporting System (PIWRS)](http://piwrs.ucr.edu)
Principal investigator reporting and research administration system.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Maps](http://www.campusmap.ucr.edu/)
Campus maps and location resources.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Alternative Parking for Bikers](https://transportation.ucr.edu/bike-walk/bike-walk-program)
Bike and pedestrian transportation resources.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Profile Pages](https://profiles.ucr.edu/)
UCR people directory and academic profile pages.  
[Old UCR Directory](http://enterprisedirectory.ucr.edu/phone/tel_search.show)
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Create Wireless Guest Account](http://guestid.ucr.edu)
Guest wireless account creation portal.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Computer Labs](http://scs.ucr.edu/)
Campus computing labs and instructional technology resources.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Software Site Licenses](http://sitelicense.ucr.edu/)
Campus-licensed software and installation information.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Book Seminar Rooms](http://frs.ucr.edu)
Seminar room reservation system.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [C&amp;C Workorder](http://comm.ucr.edu)
Communications and campus IT workorder requests.
:::

:::

## UCR Teaching Resources {#teaching-resources .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [Course Catalog](http://www.catalog.ucr.edu/)
Official course catalog and program descriptions.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Search Course Catalog](http://classinfo.ucr.edu/)
Searchable schedule of classes and course offerings.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Course Request System (CRS)](https://registrar.ucr.edu/crs/support)
Support site for course scheduling and request workflows.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [iLearn](http://ilearn.ucr.edu/)
Legacy course management system.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Canvas (eLearn)](https://elearn.ucr.edu/)
Current online learning platform for courses and teaching.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [iGrade](http://igrade.ucr.edu/)
Online grading and course record management system.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Course Evals (Qualtrics)](https://ucrcourseevals.qualtrics.com/homepage/ui)
Course evaluation platform for instructional feedback.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [CRAMS](http://crams.ucr.edu/crams/crams_directory.main)
Classroom scheduling and room assignment system.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [Academic Calendar](http://registrar.ucr.edu/registrar/academic-calendar/default.aspx)
Official academic calendar.  
[Details](http://registrar.ucr.edu/registrar/academic-calendar/print-academic-calendar.html) · [Old version](http://www.classes.ucr.edu/enrollment/calendar.htm) · [UCR Holiday Calendar](http://accounting.ucr.edu/payroll/pay_cal.html)
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [R'Space](http://rspace.ucr.edu/)
Faculty and student administrative portal.  
Includes [Grad SIS](https://gradsis.ucr.edu/gradsis/GSIS_MENU.Menu_NonStudent).
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [TAship Application System](http://taonline.ucr.edu/)
Teaching assistant application and appointment system.
:::

:::

## GGB {#ggb .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [Website](http://ggb.ucr.edu/)
Main site for the Genetics, Genomics and Bioinformatics program.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [SharePoint](https://ucrshare.ucr.edu/sites/cnas/BSGSAC/ggb/SitePages/Home.aspx)
Internal SharePoint site for GGB-related information and documents.
:::

::: {.link-card}
### [R'GRAD Forms](https://rgrad.ucr.edu/app/home)
Graduate forms and workflow portal.
:::

:::

## Recruitment {#recruitment .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [AP Recruit](https://aprecruit.ucr.edu/)
Academic recruitment and faculty hiring portal.
:::

:::

## Ordering {#ordering .link-section}

::: {.link-grid}

::: {.link-card}
### [eBuy](http://ebuy.ucr.edu/ebuy)
Campus purchasing and ordering system.
:::

:::
